title: EHR Summarisation using LLMs
shortDescription: Building a clinical summarisation model to reduce ICU documentation burden in handoffs, targeting a JAMIA publication.
clinicalProblem: ICU documentation burden leads to 40% missed findings during handoffs at KMC Manipal.
collaboratorRole: Fine-tune a clinical summarisation model, validate with clinicians, co-write the results section for JAMIA submission.

title: Retinal Scan Grading with Deep Learning
shortDescription: Developing a CNN-based grading pipeline for retinal scans to reduce diagnostic fatigue and inconsistency in ophthalmology.
clinicalProblem: Ophthalmologists at KMC manually grade ~200 scans/day, causing diagnostic fatigue and 18% inter-rater inconsistency.
collaboratorRole: Build and evaluate CNN-based grading pipeline on multi-centre fundus dataset. Co-author methods + results sections.

title: Sepsis Early Warning Score using ML
shortDescription: Training a real-time sepsis risk model on structured EMR data and deploying as a Streamlit dashboard for ICU nurses.
clinicalProblem: Sepsis accounts for 11% of ICU admissions at KMC; current NEWS2 score misses 30% of cases in first 6 hours.
collaboratorRole: Train + validate a real-time sepsis risk model on structured EMR data. Deploy as a Streamlit dashboard for ICU nurses.

title: Cancer Prognosis with Multimodal AI
shortDescription: Architecting a multimodal fusion model for personalised 5-year cancer survival estimates using genomics, imaging, and clinical notes.
clinicalProblem: Oncologists lack personalised 5-year survival estimates integrating genomics, imaging, and clinical notes simultaneously.
collaboratorRole: Architect and train a multimodal fusion model. Validate on TCGA + KMC cohort. Lead the technical writing for manuscript.

title: Clinical Trial Recruitment via NLP
shortDescription: Building an NLP pipeline to match eligible patients with open clinical trials, reducing manual screening time from 4 hours per patient.
clinicalProblem: KMC Oncology struggles to match eligible patients to open trials — manual screening takes 4 hrs/patient.
collaboratorRole: Build NLP pipeline to parse trial inclusion/exclusion criteria and match against EHR patient summaries. Develop the UI portal.
